i : Set (Set ι)
univ_sets✝ : univ ∈ i
sets_of_superset✝ : ∀ {x y : Set ι}, x ∈ i → x ⊆ y → y ∈ i
inter_sets✝ : ∀ {x y : Set ι}, x ∈ i → y ∈ i → x ∩ y ∈ i
inst✝ :
  { sets := i, univ_sets := univ_sets✝, sets_of_superset := sets_of_superset✝,
      inter_sets := inter_sets✝ }.IsCountablyGenerated
ha :
  Tendsto a { sets := i, univ_sets := univ_sets✝, sets_of_superset := sets_of_superset✝, inter_sets := inter_sets✝ }
    atBot
hb :
  Tendsto b { sets := i, univ_sets := univ_sets✝, sets_of_superset := sets_of_superset✝, inter_sets := inter_sets✝ }
    atTop
⊢ Tendsto (fun i => ∫ (x : ℝ) in a i..b i, f x ∂μ)
    { sets := i, univ_sets := univ_sets✝, sets_of_superset := sets_of_superset✝, inter_sets := inter_sets✝ }
    (𝓝 (∫ (x : ℝ), f x ∂μ))

      | l =>

        | node black a y b => l.balance2 v (node red a y b)
        | node red (node black a y b) z c => node red (node black l v a) y (b.balance2 z c.setRed)
        | r => node red l v r).toList =
    l.toList ++ v :: r.toList
